user_intent: Two strangers meeting up for a run, fist bumping before they start. This represents the Run Buddy feature — connecting with someone new. One is clearly a regular, one looks newer. Both about to run. Hard dramatic lighting, urban setting, Oakley/Nike campaign energy. The moment before the miles start.

subject.description: Black woman, early 30s, experienced runner energy, confident stance, deep brown skin with a light pre-run sweat starting, warm welcoming smile as she extends her fist, medium-length goddess locs with lime green loc jewelry, toned arms showing she does this regularly
clothing: black running crop top with a faded orange run club graphic
well-worn black Nike running shoes showing she has miles on them
accessories: one wireless earbud in, one out ready to chat

subject.description: Black man, mid 20s, newer runner energy, slightly nervous but excited, medium brown skin, meeting his fist to hers with a genuine grateful smile, fresh fade haircut, less defined runner build showing he is early in his journey
clothing: brand new neon lime green running shirt that still looks crisp and unworn
black basketball shorts repurposed for running
accessories: phone in hand like he was just using the app to find his buddy

scene.location: Outside a Deep Ellum venue in Dallas Texas at night, a neon sign reading something indistinct in lime green glowing above them, brick building facade behind them, other runners warming up in the blurred background suggesting this is a group run meetup spot, the street visible with warm city lights
scene.weather: warm summer evening, purple-blue twilight sky still visible at the very top of frame

lighting.direction: hard neon lime green light from the sign overhead casting down on them, warm orange ambient from a streetlight behind camera, their fist bump point is the brightest spot where the two light sources meet

materials.texture: rough brick and warm skin tones

composition.framing: centered on the fist bump which is the focal point of the entire image, both subjects framed from waist up, the fist bump happens in the exact center of the frame
composition.angle: slightly low angle looking up, making the moment feel significant and powerful
composition.focus_subject: the fist bump point and their two fists touching, razor sharp, with their faces in acceptable sharp focus, background falling into creamy bokeh

quality.sharpness: razor-sharp on the fist bump and faces, beautiful bokeh falloff behind them
quality.post_processing: cinematic color grading, neon lime and orange accent tones, film grain, the fist bump should almost glow where the two light sources converge on it, warm and inviting not cold, Nike Find Your Greatness campaign energy

negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, watermark, text overlay, distorted hands, extra fingers, cartoon, illustration, flat lighting, stock photo handshake, corporate, formal, gym interior, daytime harsh sunlight, forced smile, stiff posed
